header.description: Read, update, write and delete data from Airtable

oldVersionNotice.displayName: New node version available: get the latest version with added features from the nodes panel.

deprecated.displayName: This type of connection (API Key) was deprecated and can't be used anymore. Please create a new credential of type 'Access Token' instead.

append.description: Append the data to a table

application.description: The Airtable Base in which to operate on

addAllFields.description: Whether all fields should be sent to Airtable or only specific ones

fields.description: The name of fields for which data should be sent to Airtable

id.description: ID of the record to update

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

downloadAttachments.description: Whether the attachment fields define in 'Download Fields' will be downloaded

downloadFieldNames.description: Name of the fields of type 'attachment' that should be downloaded. Multiple ones can be defined separated by comma. Case sensitive and cannot include spaces after a comma.

additionalOptions.description: Additional options which decide which records should be returned

fields.description: Only data for fields whose names are in this list will be included in the records

filterByFormula.description: A formula used to filter records. The formula will be evaluated for each record, and if the result is not 0, false, "", NaN, [], or #Error! the record will be included in the response.

sort.description: Defines how the returned records should be ordered

field.description: Name of the field to sort on
Name of the field to sort on

view.description: The name or ID of a view in the Stories table. If set, only the records in that view will be returned. The records will be sorted according to the order of the view.

updateAllFields.description: Whether all fields should be sent to Airtable or only specific ones

bulkSize.description: Number of records to process at once

ignoreFields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to ignore

typecast.description: Whether the Airtable API should attempt mapping of string values for linked records & select options
